# Zroxz

> AI automation and creative agency serving the United States, Canada, and North America.
> Founded 2005 by Muhammad Arfa. Based in Pakistan, operating remotely across North America.

## What We Do

Zroxz builds AI-powered systems that replace manual bottlenecks in US and Canadian businesses.
We specialize in AI chatbots, AI voice agents, CRM automation, SaaS development, website
development, and professional video editing and motion design.

## Services

- **AI Chatbots** — Custom conversational AI for websites, CRMs, and WhatsApp. Integrate with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Shopify. Deployment: 2–4 weeks. Price range: $1,200–$2,500.
- **AI Voice Agents** — Automated phone agents built on ElevenLabs + GoHighLevel that handle inbound and outbound calls 24/7, qualify leads, and route hot prospects. Deployment: 2–3 weeks.
- **CRM Automation** — GoHighLevel pipelines, n8n workflows, and Zapier integrations. Automates lead qualification, follow-up sequences, and CRM data entry. Average: 15+ hours saved per week.
- **Website Development** — Shopify, Next.js, and custom conversion-focused builds. All sites ship with SEO, performance optimization, and 90+ Google Lighthouse scores. Delivery: 3–6 weeks.
- **Video Editing & Motion Design** — Brand reels, social content, product demos, and animated explainers. 48-hour standard turnaround, monthly content packages available.
- **SaaS Development** — Full-stack platforms on Next.js, MERN stack, and Supabase with multi-tenant architecture, Stripe billing, and LLM integration. MVP delivery: 6–10 weeks.

## Geographic Coverage

- United States (all 50 states)
- Canada (all provinces)
- English-speaking North America

## Proof of Work

**Evinn.pk case study:** Zroxz built an AI voice agent for Evinn.pk, an electric scooter company
handling 80+ customer calls daily. The agent handles inbound calls 24/7, qualifies leads, and
routes urgent cases to humans. Results: 70% reduction in handle time, zero after-hours missed
leads.

## Pricing Reference

- AI Chatbot: $1,200–$2,500
- AI Voice Agent: $1,500+
- Website: $2,000–$8,000
- SaaS Platform: custom quote (discovery call required)
- Video editing: contact for package rates
